headline: Cboe (CBOE) Stock Looks Fully Valued As Returns Shine But Earnings Lag
summary: Cboe Global Markets has delivered a strong 143.2% return over the past 5 years, yet its current valuation checks and market multiples suggest the stock is priced at a premium rather than as a clear bargain. Recent headlines around record trading volumes and product expansion have sharpened the debate over whether investors are now paying up for that track record. A 143.2% 5 year return points to a stock that has already rewarded long term holders, which raises the bar for any new upside...
